name: devflow
description: DevFlow - Agentic Development Toolkit for Claude Code

plugins.name: devflow-specify
plugins.description: Interactive feature specification - creates well-defined GitHub issues

plugins.name: devflow-implement
plugins.description: Complete task implementation workflow with exploration, planning, and coding

plugins.name: devflow-code-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive code review with parallel specialized agents

plugins.name: devflow-resolve
plugins.description: Process and fix code review issues with risk assessment

plugins.name: devflow-debug
plugins.description: Debugging workflows with competing hypothesis investigation using agent teams

plugins.name: devflow-self-review
plugins.description: Self-review workflow: Simplifier + Scrutinizer for code quality

plugins.name: devflow-core-skills
plugins.description: Auto-activating quality enforcement skills - foundation layer for all DevFlow plugins

plugins.name: devflow-ambient
plugins.description: Ambient mode — classifies intent and applies proportional effort (skills for guided work, agent orchestration for complex tasks)

plugins.name: devflow-audit-claude
plugins.description: Audit CLAUDE.md files against Anthropic best practices

plugins.name: devflow-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript language patterns - type safety, generics, utility types, type guards

plugins.name: devflow-react
plugins.description: React framework patterns - hooks, state management, composition, performance

plugins.name: devflow-accessibility
plugins.description: Web accessibility patterns - WCAG compliance, ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, focus management

plugins.name: devflow-frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design patterns - typography, color systems, spacing, motion, responsive design

plugins.name: devflow-go
plugins.description: Go language patterns - error handling, interfaces, concurrency, package design

plugins.name: devflow-python
plugins.description: Python language patterns - type hints, protocols, dataclasses, async programming

plugins.name: devflow-java
plugins.description: Java language patterns - records, sealed classes, composition, modern Java features

plugins.name: devflow-rust
plugins.description: Rust language patterns - ownership, borrowing, error handling, type-driven design
